item.title: Cyberpunk 2077 Could Be Coming to Xbox Game Pass Soon
item.description:
Cyberpunk 2077 might be the next blockbuster title to join the Xbox Game Pass library. The popular subscription service is famous for adding heavy-hitting games throughout the month, and the latest clues suggest that one of the industry's biggest success stories is on the horizon. While the official announcement is still pending, fans are currently dissecting every detail of a recent social media post to confirm what many suspect is a major addition to the March 2026 Xbox Game Pass lineup.

Xbox Game Pass has changed the way people play on both console and PC since it first arrived back in 2017. Despite Game Pass seeing some significant price increases over the last year, the platform remains popular because it consistently refreshes its catalog with a mix of indie gems and AAA hits. The service is known for its lighthearted marketing style, often using fictional staff members to interact with the community and build hype for upcoming releases.

A Familiar Name in the Inbox

The current excitement around Cyberpunk 2077 coming to Game Pass stems from a comedic "leaked" internal email shared by the official Xbox Game Pass account. The message comes from a fictional executive named Melissa McGamepass, whose absurdly long title—Chief Executive Director Chair of Senior Operations & Grand Liaison of Video Game Communications—has become a recurring joke for the brand. In the note, she mentions that there is "no such thing as too many games" and points out that there are "so many breathtaking worlds to explore."

The most glaring hint in the email is a sentence stating that the next upcoming addition will be a "v good one," with the letter "v" written in bold. Fans of the genre were quick to point out that "V" is the name of the main character in CD Projekt Red’s gritty sci-fi hit. The caption for the post also promises that something "v cool" is coming soon, which strongly suggests that the marketing team is intentionally drawing attention to that specific letter as a clue.

Beyond the bolded letters, the email contains a second major reference that points toward Cyberpunk 2077 . The message begins with the phrase, "Wake up social team." This sounds almost identical to the memorable line delivered by Keanu Reeves’ character, Johnny Silverhand, in early trailers for the game, where he famously tells the player to "Wake the f**k up, Samurai." This combination of "v" and "wake up" has left the community convinced that a trip to Night City is in their immediate future.

This teaser comes during a time of significant leadership shifts within the Xbox organization. Long-time Xbox leader Phil Spencer has officially retired, and former Xbox President Sarah Bond has also left the company. The brand is now being guided by Matt Booty and Asha Sharma, with Sharma serving as the CEO of Microsoft Gaming. Sharma has been vocal about a recommitment to core Xbox players and has expressed a desire to focus on games that elicit deep emotional responses from the audience.

The "leak" format has a proven track record of being accurate. Just last month, a similar email tease was used to hint at the arrival of Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 on Xbox Game Pass. In that instance, the official announcement followed only one day after the social media clue was posted. If this pattern holds true, an official confirmation of Cyberpunk 2077 could happen as early as Tuesday.

The email also included a few humorous nods to other gaming icons to keep fans guessing. The inbox featured a message from Mortal Kombat 's Johnny Cage asking to become the new mascot, along with a silent, one-word message from the Doom Slayer. While these other entries are clearly meant as fun Easter eggs, the specific bolding of the letter "v" mirrors past teases for games on Xbox Game Pass like Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora , which also used social media clues just before an official reveal.

If the rumors are true, this would be a massive acquisition for the March 2026 Game Pass roster. Cyberpunk 2077 hit a milestone of 35 million copies sold by late 2025, recovering from a difficult launch to become a favorite for action-RPG fans. For those who have been curious to see why the game has earned so much hype but haven't made a full purchase, a Game Pass arrival would offer the perfect chance to jump in.

6 /10

Cyberpunk 2077

Follow
Followed
RPG
Action
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews

Released

item.title: Pokemon Winds and Waves Fan Gives the New Starters the Gen 2 Sprite Treatment
item.description:
A Pokemon Winds and Waves fan redesigned the starters from the upcoming Pokemon games as sprites from the Pokemon Gold and Silver era. The fan-made Gen 2 sprites of the Pokemon Winds and Waves starters, which are called Browt, Pombon, and Gecqua, were then posted on social media for all Pokemon fans to see.

During the February 27 Pokemon Presents episode, The Pokemon Company closed the show by giving fans the first official glimpses of Pokemon Winds and Waves . Set in a yet-unnamed island region, Pokemon Winds and Waves are exclusive to the Nintendo Switch 2 console. The Pokemon Winds and Waves teaser also gave Pokemon fans the first looks at the new Gen 10 starters. Once the games arrives in 2027, Pokemon trainers can choose between the Grass-type Browt, the Fire-type Pombon, and the Water-type Gecqua.

Pokemon Fan Gives Gen 10's Starter Trio a Retro Makeover

Following the Pokemon Day festivities, a Pokemon fan posted their re-creation of what the first encounter with the starters of Pokemon Winds and Waves would look like in Gen 2's iconic sprite style. The Twitter feed Gen2Sprites posted an image of what Browt, Pombon, and Gecqua would look like as overworld sprites from Pokemon Gold and Silver . Additional sprites were made of the Pokemon Winds and Waves protagonists in their version-exclusive outfits, with the Pokemon Winds trainer on the left, and the Pokemon Waves trainer on the right. Browt, Pombon, and Gecqua were lined up from left to right, amid a field of tall grass and palm trees. Browt's sprout-shaped eyebrows, Pombon's fur and tongue, and Gecqua's eyeliner could be seen in each Gen 2-inspired sprite. In response, one Pokemon fan compared the Gen2Sprites post to a cutscene from Pokemon Crystal , in which Johto's Legendary Beasts flee the Burned Tower after being accidentally awoken by the player character.

Shortly after revealing Pokemon Winds and Waves for the first time, The Pokemon Company shared a few more details about the Gen 10 starters via some Pokedex data that will appear in the games. Browt is categorized as the Bean Chick Pokemon, and is known for running around while photosynthesizing using the leaves on its eyebrows. Pombon is the fiery and friendly Puppy Pokemon that has a heat-generating organ that glows beneath its throat. Finally, Gecqua is a Water Gecko Pokemon that launches balls of water from its tail, and is known to be an intelligent and shrewd battler. Pombon is the tallest and heaviest of the three Pokemon Winds and Waves starters, clocking in at 1'4" and 14.8 lbs. Each starter also has the long-running abilities Overgrow, Blaze, and Torrent, which boost the power of specific moves once they drop below a third of their maximum HP. Other details about the new starter Pokemon remained elusive.

Pokemon's New Starters Are Already Popular Among Fan Artists

Given that the reveal of Pokemon Winds and Waves is still a fresh topic in the minds of Pokemon trainers, some Pokemon fan artists created their interpretations of what the fully-evolved Gen 10 starters could look like. One interpretation turned Browt into a gigantic bird with long tail feathers and an exaggerated eyebrow, gave Gecqua's final form a draconic visage, and made Pombon's fiery body more striking. As Pokemon Winds and Waves draws closer to its release, time will tell when The Pokemon Company will reveal the fully-evolved designs, and elemental types, of Gen 10's starter trio.

Subscribe for in-depth Pokemon Winds and Waves coverage

Want deeper looks? Subscribe to our newsletter for fan-art spotlights, Gen 2 sprite retrospectives, Pokedex breakdowns, and design analysis of Pokemon Winds and Waves — plus context on Gen 10's starters and other Pokemon developments.
By subscribing, you agree to receive newsletter and marketing emails, and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can unsubscribe anytime.

However, Pokemon fans will be waiting quite a while for that information. Pokemon Winds and Waves are slated to launch on Switch 2 sometime in 2027, after Pokemon 's 30th anniversary concludes. Given the long wait, the current ninth Pokemon game generation will be the longest-running generation to date. With Pokemon Winds and Waves also being exclusive to the Switch 2, fans interested in playing Pokemon 's next generation should pick one up before prices change.

Pokémon Winds and Waves

Follow
Followed

Adventure

item.title: Every Feature Confirmed for Life is Strange: Reunion So Far
item.description:
Life is Strange: Reunion was announced at the beginning of the year, and fans of the long-running series aren't going to have to wait much longer to finally play it. The new chapter in the Life is Strange franchise is set to launch on March 26, and it marks the long-awaited return of fan favorite character Chloe Price. Life is Strange: Reunion has already teased plenty of drama and danger on the way for Max and Chloe, but that's merely the tip of the iceberg.

Although plans could change down the road, Life is Strange: Reunion is expected to be the last Life is Strange game in the series. It has now been 11 years since the first game dropped, so it's wild to realize that the franchise has spanned over a decade now. With this being the end of Max Caulfield's story, it only makes sense to bring Chloe back for one final chapter. It's unclear exactly how Chloe finds herself back in Max's life, but all will be revealed in just a few weeks. Caledon University is merely days away from total destruction, and Max and Chloe will have to learn to work together to make sure that doesn't happen.

Life is Strange: Reunion's Confirmed Features Promise Nostalgia and Series Firsts

The story takes place after the events of Life is Strange: Double Exposure and is once again set at Caledon University. Max returns to the campus after a weekend away and finds that the university has been engulfed in a raging fire. In Life is Strange: Double Exposure , Max Caulfield's Rewind powers morphed into abilities that allowed her to shift between timelines. However, her Rewind powers are back in full swing this time around. This isn't the only returning power that players will get to experience, though.

Max Caulfield and Chloe Price Take Center Stage as Life is Strange: Reunion's Dual Protagonists

This is an exciting move for Life is Strange: Reunion . Instead of a single protagonist, players will get to control both Max and Chloe for the first time ever. Of course, this isn't the only time players have stepped in Chloe's shoes, but getting to bounce back between these two characters is bound to be interesting. The Life is Strange franchise has featured several compelling protagonists, but Max and Chloe have continued to be the heart of the series.

  • Max Caulfield will have her classic Rewind powers again.
  • Chloe Price's Backtalk ability from Life is Strange: Before the Storm comes back into play.

Max and Chloe's reunion isn't the only thing that is going to feel steeped in nostalgia. The mix of both Max's Rewind powers and Chloe's Backtalk reintroduces the staple gameplay features of their stories. What's even more intriguing is that Life is Strange: Reunion 's gameplay mechanics have players controlling conversations between the two characters in certain scenes. So, instead of having to pick whether to control what just Max or Chloe says, players can control the entire conversation. This will likely make interactions between them flow better, since players can steer discussions in certain directions. Because of this, Life is Strange: Reunion has the potential to have some of the franchise's most dynamic gameplay yet. Having access to two abilities that function quite differently promises an added layer. Max will focus on redoing mistakes and changing the timeline, and Chloe opens the door for dialogue-based risk and reward.

Other Features Confirmed For Max and Chloe

  • Both Max and Chloe will have journals that players can look through.
  • Max can now take pictures at any time, not just at photo hotspots.

A Player's Choices Still Matter in Life is Strange: Reunion

Choices in Life is Strange are crucial, and this chapter will continue that tradition. Ahead of the deadly fire that's destined to take over Caledon University, Max and Chloe have to find the cause behind the campus' impending doom. Throughout the story, both Max and Chloe will be faced with certain decisions. This could either lead to saving the day or losing friends.

Since the first game had players choose to sacrifice Arcadia Bay in order to save Chloe and vice versa, it's going to be fascinating to see if Max is going to be presented with a similar choice this time around. Even after 11 years, this endgame choice is still difficult for a lot of Life is Strange fans. Life is Strange had a huge impact on choice-based gameplay, and seeing how Chloe's story plays out in a reality where she was able to live could actually end up having some dire consequences for her by the end of Life is Strange: Reunion .

A live-action adaptation of the first Life is Strange game is in development for Amazon Prime.

Life is Strange: Reunion Embraces the Role That Music Has Played in Shaping the Franchise

To this day, the first Life is Strange game has one of the best licensed soundtracks in gaming. "Obstacles" by Syd Matters and "Mt. Washington" by Local Natives are just a few of the many great songs that would be introduced to players. Thankfully, music is still at the heart of Life is Strange: Reunion . The official Life is Strange: Reunion soundtrack hasn't been fully revealed yet, but the game's Steam page is teasing "a rich original score and songs, and licensed tracks, both nostalgic and new." So, since developer Deck Nine made sure to emphasize nostalgia, it wouldn't be surprising if "Obstacles" by Syd Matters plays during a particularly emotional moment between Max and Chloe.

Life is Strange: Reunion Hints at a Deeply Emotional Finale

Even though Life is Strange: Double Exposure 's story didn't exactly stick the landing, this final chapter could be different. Another story that explores Max and Chloe's connection may feel a bit like nostalgia bait, but it might be the necessary step needed to bring players a satisfying conclusion. Right now, what lies in store for Max, Chloe, and the students and faculty at Caledon University is a big mystery. Thankfully, the wait to see what happens won't be much longer. Life is Strange: Reunion marks a bittersweet end for the series, and it's hopefully a finale that nails the return of Max and Chloe's relationship.

Life is Strange: Reunion

Follow
Followed

item.title: How to Get Past The Guards in Pokemon FireRed & LeafGreen
item.description:
In Pokemon FireRed & LeafGreen , players might have already arrived at Celadon City, and, thinking they have the upper hand, bought a Lemonade or Soda Pop and taken it to the Guards that are blocking the access to Saffron City . They will soon be shocked to notice this doesn't work at all, and that's because things are a little different in Pokemon FR/LG .

If you find yourself stuck and don't know what to do next, then you've come to the right place. Here's how to find the Tea Key Item needed to quench the guards' thirst and open the doors to Saffron City in Pokemon FireRed & LeafGreen .

How To Get Past The Guards and Enter Saffron City In Pokemon FireRed & LeafGreen

To get past the guards and enter Saffron City in Pokemon FireRed & LeafGreen players will have to get past the guards on any of the checkpoints (south of Cerulean, north of Vermillion, west of Lavender, east of Celadon). The guards at the checkpoint will avoid players from going through, and say that they are 'really thirsty.'

In older versions (Red, Blue, Yellow, Green) players had to purchase a drink at the Celadon store vending machine (in the rooftop) to give it to the guards. But in the case of FR/LG, players will need a special key item: the Tea .

This item can be obtained from the old lady on the first floor of Celadon Mansion (entering from the front, not the back entrance to get Eevee). She will give them the Tea, so players now need to take it back to the guards, and presto: Now they can enter Saffron City.

Players can share this Tea with any of the guards at the entrance Gates to Saffron, and they just need to do it once. The guard will share the tea with the other guys, so all doors will be automatically open.

And in case players are wondering, they can still buy Fresh Water, Soda Pop, and Lemonade from the rooftop of Celadon's Store, and gift it to the little trainer girl there to obtain the MTs for Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard .

So, next time players are around the Celadon Store, they should visit the rooftop and pick up one of each of these drinks to obtain some useful TMs.

Follow
Followed
Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen

Adventure
Systems
Released

item.title: Zombie Waves Codes (March 2026)
item.description:
Zombie Waves is a great example of an entertaining time-killer with an interesting setting, mechanics, and concept that will keep you playing for days or even months. Here, you play the role of a survivor in the zombie apocalypse and have to fight back against the undead, improving your weapons, level, and talents, as well as creating unique skill sets.

By redeeming Zombie Waves codes, you will receive generous rewards from the developers that will help you progress in the game faster. Each code offers useful rewards like resources and currency that will definitely come in handy, so don't neglect it.

Updated March 2, 2026, by Artur Novichenko: There are several new codes available, each offering different in-game rewards. These can help with progression or give you small boosts while playing. We keep this guide updated as new codes are released, so it’s a good idea to check back regularly. More rewards may appear in future updates, making it worth revisiting.

All Zombie Waves Codes

Working Zombie Waves Codes

  • yuanxiao2026 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards. (NEW)
  • rsdef23 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards. (NEW)
  • loveinzw2026 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards. (NEW)
  • festivity2026zw - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards. (NEW)
  • rustore2026 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • Newyear26zw - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • Jingle25bellzw - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • rustore2025 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • zw25candy - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • dig2win25zw - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • oktoberfest25zw - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • QIXIZW2025 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • zw25bk2school - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • duanwuk25zw - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • HBDZW2025 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • ANNIV2ZW25 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • DYZBZS - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • DYZB666 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • DYZB888 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • ZWgood - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • ZWfun - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • SJFKTBXD - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • SJFKtap - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • sjfkgzh - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • VIP666 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • VIP777 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.
  • VIP888 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards
  • VIP999 - Redeem this code to get in-game rewards.

Expired Zombie Waves Codes

  • DSWK25ZW
  • sonkran25zw
  • shamrock25zw
  • loveinzw2025
  • festivity2025zw
  • Thanksgiving24zw
  • Celebration75
  • HWZW8888
  • newyear2025
  • zw2024xmas
  • Halloween24zw
  • MOONCAKE2024
  • fb100k2024
  • romantic77
  • olympics2024
  • ZNQKH2024
  • zwdragon
  • Laborday
  • qm2024
  • Easter
  • ух2024
  • LNY2024
  • hello2024
  • christmas

Regardless of your progress in this exciting game, redeeming Zombie Waves codes will always be a nice bonus. It's a convenient and easy method to quickly earn currency and other stuff, so take advantage of this opportunity.

How to Redeem Codes for Zombie Waves

Fortunately, Zombie Waves ’s redemption system is quite simple and available directly in the game, so the whole process will take you a few clicks. However, if you have any difficulties redeeming Zombie Waves codes, or you don't know how it works, here is a detailed guide:

  • Launch Zombie Waves .
  • Pay attention to the upper-left corner of the screen. Your avatar will be located there. Click on it.
  • After doing so, you will open a new menu with basic information about your account. Also, you will see the Bundle Code button below this menu. Click on it.
  • This will open the redemption menu. There will be an input field and two buttons, Cancel and Exchange. Now, enter manually or, better yet, copy and paste one of the above-mentioned active codes into the input field.
  • Lastly, click on the green Exchange button to send your reward request.

If everything is done correctly, a notification will appear on the screen with a list of rewards received.

How to Get More Zombie Waves Codes

To find more Roblox codes, you need to visit the game's official social media pages. Here, along with other content, the developers often share codes, so you may be lucky enough to find them and be one of the first to receive rewards:

  • Official Zombie Waves Discord server.
  • Official Zombie Waves Facebook page.

Zombie Waves is available on mobile games.
